title: Funeral held in Gaza for leader of Hamas’ military wing killed in Israeli strike
description: Mourners in the Gaza Strip held a funeral procession for the leader of Hamas’ military wing on Saturday after he was killed in an Israeli airstrike the previous day.

title: NTR’s Dragon glimpse runtime leaves fans shocked
description: Hyderabad: Jr NTR and Prashanth Neel’s much-awaited pan-India film is once again making headlines. The project, which has been referred to as NTRNeel until now, is reportedly titled Dragon. The update surfaced after the film’s glimpse certification details appeared on the CBFC website. According to reports, the teaser has been certified under the title “Glimpse of Dragon”, almost ...
